title: What Does N.O.S. Stand For In Hazmat
source_filename: What Does N.O.S. Stand For In Hazmat.docx

qas.q: What does the abbreviation "n.o.s" stand for?
What is the "initial boiling Point"?
qas.a: The temperature where liquid under test first boils

qas.q: How many hazard classes of dangerous goods are there?
What does the "Packing Group" indicate?
What is a "Flammable Liquid"
qas.a: A liquid which has a flash point of 60°C (closed cup) or less

qas.q: What is required by the DGR for marking and labeling of the upright position of a package containing liquids?
What type of outer packaging does this specification represent: 4G/Z/25/S/15/GB396?
What does the letter "X" represent in a Package Specification marking?
The "Magnatized Material" label is what type of label?
Who is responsible for the marking and labeling of Dangerous Packages
Are amendments allowed on the Shippers Declaration?
How many copies of the Shippers Declaration are required?
In what section of the IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations would you find the "List of Dangerous Goods"?
In what section of the IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations would you find the Operator and State Variations?
What does the abbreviation "NEW" stand for?
What does the abbreviation "PPR" stand for?
What does the abbreviation "CAO" stand for?
The standard unit of measure for the activity of a radionuclide is what?
The standard unit of measure for radiation exposure is what?
What is Single Packaging?
qas.a: The hazardaous material is shipping within the outerpackaging with no other inner packaging.

qas.q: What is Combination Packaging?
qas.a: The hazardardous material is shipping in an inner packaging which is then placed inside the outer packaging.

qas.q: The code "4G" describes what type of outer package?
The packing group with the highest degree of danger is what?
The letter "Y" in front of a packing instruction indicates what?
This type of shipment does not require a Shippers Declaration or UN Specification Packaging.
This type of shipement requires a Shippers Declaration but does not require UN Specification Packaging.
Shipment type that requires a Shippers Declaration, UN Specification Packaging, and is not allowed on passenger aircraft.
What reference(s) requires Orientation Labels be placed on a liquid shipment?
